title: Grassy Green Italian Vegetable Pasta
description: A flavorful and healthy Italian dish featuring steamed vegetables and pasta, with a touch of red chilli powder for added spice. This macrobiotic-friendly recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Fill a large pot with water and bring to a boil.
Add the pasta and cook according to package instructions.
In a bamboo steamer, steam the broccoli, zucchini, and red bell pepper for 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil, garlic, red chilli powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked pasta to the bowl and toss with the oil and spice mixture.
To serve, place the pasta on a plate and top with the steamed vegetables.
Garnish with fresh parsley or basil, if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
